productDisplayName: Hanes Men White Stretch Duo Dry Cotton Stretch Hip Briefs s
description: Style Note hanes knows how to deliver basics which are practical, comfortable and stylish. This brief is crafted using soft absorbent cotton fabric with duo-dry moisture management technology which helps the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch with ease. The printed label on the inner allows abrasion-free comfort while the superior stretch elastic offers easy leg movement. Product Details White hip brief made from superior cotton elastane fabric that is designed to absorb moisture from the skin and release it outside and enables easy stretch movement, engineered with duo-dry management technology to keep you cool and dry, has ComfortSoft waistband for a snug Fit and is tagless Material and Care 95% cotton, 5% spandex Machine wash with like colours in warm water using a non chlorine bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron if needed The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
